title: A Joining Bonus Lands
scenario: Along with your first salary, the company credits a ₹40,000 joining bonus. It feels like 'extra' money. What do you do with it?

choices.label: Treat yourself — you earned it
choices.lesson: One-off money feels free, but spending all of it quietly raises your lifestyle baseline before your habits are even set.

choices.label: Park most of it as your starting buffer
choices.lesson: A windfall at the very start is the easiest time to build a buffer, because you weren't yet relying on that money.
